key_design_decisions: DR3-002 enforced: ``if seed is not None`` (not ``if seed:``) at every Qwen call site so seed=0 propagates correctly
DR4-001 enforced: ``type(x) is int`` / ``type(x) is bool`` strict checks in resolve_eval_seed reject YAML 'true'/'false' silent coercion

Backwards compat invariant verified: legacy single-positional ``generator.generate(messages)`` shape preserved when seed=None across all 3 PhotonRAGPipeline Qwen call sites (L1030, L1043, L1394) and the RepoRAGPipeline path
--repo-id silent bug fix in run_baseline_eval.py mirrors the existing fix in run_multi_turn_eval.py (cfg.repo.repo_id mutated before build_pipeline)
11 test cases for resolve_eval_seed (work-plan asked 10; added a symmetric seed=False bool test for completeness)
Determinism integration test produced byte-identical output on local Apple Silicon — acceptance criterion 1 PASS
next_step_recommendation: Codex review (Stage 5-8) → acceptance test → refactor → progress report. Step 5-6 (--runs N + aggregator) should land in a follow-up PR after Issue #156 merges; Step 8-9 (manual ablation + 10-run noise floor) are operator tasks (~13h).
